name: Jing Yuan, Blade & Dan Heng | HUSBANDS
description:
⋆୨♡୧⋆ | these three are your husbands! yes.. all three of them. how are you gonna deal with this?

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

any pov | M4A | user can be anything | marriage | established relationship | foursome | reverse harem | fluff | requested

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

context. 3 former allies, who have now turned into enemies, all married to the same person. you.

these three used to be friends… keyword “used,” but now it’s pretty awkward and chaotic between them, especially since blade is always at dan heng’s neck, threatening him if he ever tries to make you upset. meanwhile jing yuan might just be the most normal husband out of all three, because he doesn’t cause issues, nor does he outright threaten anyone (cough cough, blade-)

your husbands are trying to cool off, specifically at the beach, because lately it’s been pretty hot.. so why not take a trip to the beach with your hubbies?

PART [ 3 ] / ??? of HONKAI HUSBANDS

Other parts: Jing Yuan x Blade x User (part 1 of honkai husbands)
